utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 named items. Now check each for full specification: 1) destination: specified (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (June 15–19, 2024) with duration. 3) transportation: flight details include route, class, airline type, total cost, and a booking reference; lacks exact flight numbers/times but the format only requires flight details with costs—this is sufficient. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with total cost, nightly rate, nights, and booking reference; hotel name is generic (“Historic Lodge”), but it’s still a selection with costs—acceptable. 5) activities: selected activities with costs and booking references; provided. 6) additional_services: explicitly none selected; included. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown with components and totals; provided. All items are present and meet the stated coverage requirements.
